case_title: MARIA ROSADO et al VS. PATRICIA SALAZAR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-08-2010. APPEARANCES BY ALL THE PARTIES IN THE ACTION. MATTER IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-15-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT WILL SCHEDULE A SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR THE HEARING.
RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO:DEFENDANT AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR, PATRICIA

COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO PRESENT AND ASSISTS BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSADO, MARIA FLORES, ERICA YESENIA MELENDEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAZAR, PATRICIA $409.90 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $409.90, THE JUDGMENT DOES NOT INCLUDE PAYMENT OF $150.00 PLUMBING BILL WHICH REMAINS UNPAID. THE COURT URGES THE PARTIES TO USE MEDIATION TO RESOLVE PERSONAL ISSUES RELATED TO THEIR CO-TENANCY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PLAINTIFF ERICA YESENIA MELENDEZ FLORES, RETURNED "RETURN TO SENDER".
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY ROSADO, MARIA FLORES, ERICA YESENIA MELENDEZ AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR, PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
